authors.name: WBI Editorial Team
authors.bio: The World Best Insurer editorial team researches, verifies, and publishes insurance comparison data across 12 countries. Our analysts hold professional insurance qualifications and source all data from official insurer websites, regulatory filings, and policy documents. Every product listing is verified against the insurer's own published materials and assigned a confidence score.

authors.name: Durgesh Ghiya
authors.bio: Durgesh founded World Best Insurer to bring transparency to insurance comparison globally. He leads the data verification process and oversees the platform's expansion across 12 markets. His focus is on building AI-driven tools that help consumers understand complex insurance products through clear, verified data.
